name: Runaway bride
short_description: Runaway Bride 👰‍♀️💨 is a funny escape arcade game! Help Rachel run from her chaotic wedding, dodge relatives, grab keys, and sprint through 10 levels of family-fueled wedding madness.
detailed_description:
Runaway Bride 👰‍♀️💨 is a funny arcade escape game about love, chaos, and sprinting away from the worst wedding ever.

Meet Rachel — a proud lesbian who just said “I don’t” at the altar. Now she has one mission: escape in her wedding dress while her entire family chases her through 10 ridiculous levels.

🎮 Gameplay

  • Run, dodge, and escape relatives who drag you back to the altar

  • Collect keys to unlock the next level

  • Avoid obstacles and survive increasingly harder challenges

  • 10 levels full of surprises, family drama, and awkward wedding moments

😂 What Makes It Special

  • Every chasing character has a backstory (grandma is faster than she looks)

  • Mix of heartfelt themes (courage, self-love) and pure comedy

  • Fast, simple arcade gameplay with a hilarious wedding twist

🌟 Why You’ll Love It
Runaway Bride combines runner mechanics with comedy storytelling. One wrong move, and it’s back to level one — but every attempt is funnier than the last.

It’s heartfelt, chaotic, and rebellious — just like Rachel.
Weddings are optional. Running is not.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese
